notes: v365 — FIX: ↩ Undo saying 'Could not find that trade' (mostly on beta). Your 🤖 auto-pilot runs on a timer, and while it's mid-task it briefly borrows the internal 'which account am I looking at' setting — so if you tapped ↩ Undo at that exact moment, it searched the wrong account and couldn't find the trade. Now Undo (and the 🗑 Delete tools) always find the trade in whichever practice account it's actually in, even while the auto-pilot is running, and they save back to that same account. Nothing else changed. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v365.
